name: Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot
author: Poki
description: Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot is an airplane simulation game where your goal is to fly as far as you can while dodging obstacles and chasing high scores! With smooth controls and endless skies, this game brings the fun flying adventure to your fingertips. Update your airplanes with the coins you earn every time. Think you’ve got what it takes to soar the skies? How to play Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot? Swipe to fly the airplane, and move left or right to change the direction. Who created Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot? Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot is created by GeniGames. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot for free? You can play Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot for free on Poki. Can I play Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot on mobile devices and desktop? Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
